== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|qq=|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|qq=|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|4|3|6|2|5|4|3|0305|qq=}}

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|4|3|6|2|5|4|3|0305|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初五]][[zh:三月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839383]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 5|qq=March 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|4|3|6|2|5|4|3|0305|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|4|3|6|2|5|4|3|0305|qq=}}

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:184|184]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1229|1229]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from [[:en:Antei|Antei]] to [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]]. * [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Bunshō|Bunshō]] to [[:en:Ōnin|Ōnin]]. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1580|1580]] _月_日) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the [[:en:Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War]]. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the [[:en:Ejima-Ikushima_affair|Ejima-Ikushima affair]]. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor [[:en:Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)]] gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “[[:en:Kanjinchō|Kanjin-chō]].”
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1085|1085]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – [[:en:Thần Tông|Emperor Shenzong (Song)]], the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1048|1048]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|4|3|6|2|5|4|3|0305|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|184|en|184|WD=Q31400|lt=184}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1229|en|1229|WD=Q5411|lt=1229}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|WD=Q2461|lt=March 31}}) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|WD=Q737537|lt=Antei}} to {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|WD=Q1194200|lt=Kanki}}. * {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1467|en|1467|WD=Q6561|lt=1467}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Bunshō|en|Bunshō|WD=Q1193596|lt=Bunshō}} to {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580}} _月_日) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the {{ill|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|en|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|WD=Q859815|lt=Ishiyama Hongan-ji War}}. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the {{ill|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|en|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|WD=Q780023|lt=Ejima-Ikushima affair}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor {{ill|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|en|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|WD=Q5986166|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)}} gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “{{ill|Kanjinchō|en|Kanjinchō|WD=Q3179266|lt=Kanjin-chō}}.”

== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1085|en|1085|WD=Q19459|lt=1085}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1}}) – {{ill|Thần Tông|en|Thần Tông|WD=Q21406278|lt=Emperor Shenzong (Song)}}, the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1048|en|1048|WD=Q19359|lt=1048}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|WD=Q2500|lt=April 14}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|en|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|WD=Q317736|lt=Utagawa Kuniyoshi}}, a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|184|en|184|WD=Q31400|lt=184}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1229|en|1229|WD=Q5411|lt=1229}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|WD=Q2461|lt=March 31}}) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|WD=Q737537|lt=Antei}} to {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|WD=Q1194200|lt=Kanki}}. * {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1467|en|1467|WD=Q6561|lt=1467}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Bunshō|en|Bunshō|WD=Q1193596|lt=Bunshō}} to {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580}} _月_日) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the {{ill|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|en|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|WD=Q859815|lt=Ishiyama Hongan-ji War}}. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the {{ill|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|en|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|WD=Q780023|lt=Ejima-Ikushima affair}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor {{ill|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|en|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|WD=Q5986166|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)}} gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “{{ill|Kanjinchō|en|Kanjinchō|WD=Q3179266|lt=Kanjin-chō}}.”
== Births == * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō}} 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|WD=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Mototada}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367}}). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Bizan Kawakami|en|Bizan Kawakami|WD=Q529950|lt=Kawakami Bēzan}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908}}).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1085|en|1085|WD=Q19459|lt=1085}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1}}) – {{ill|Thần Tông|en|Thần Tông|WD=Q21406278|lt=Emperor Shenzong (Song)}}, the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1048|en|1048|WD=Q19359|lt=1048}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|WD=Q2500|lt=April 14}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|en|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|WD=Q317736|lt=Utagawa Kuniyoshi}}, a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初五]][[zh:三月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初五]][[zh:三月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初五]][[zh:三月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 5|qq=March 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[中平]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|184|en|184|WD=Q31400|lt=184}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – The planned simultaneous uprising of the Yellow Turban Rebellion. * [[:en:寛喜|寛喜]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1229|en|1229|WD=Q5411|lt=1229}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|WD=Q2461|lt=March 31}}) – Due to natural disasters and famine, the era name was changed from {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|WD=Q737537|lt=Antei}} to {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|WD=Q1194200|lt=Kanki}}. * {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1467|en|1467|WD=Q6561|lt=1467}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Bunshō|en|Bunshō|WD=Q1193596|lt=Bunshō}} to {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580}} _月_日) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} reached a peace agreement with Ishiyama Hongan-ji; as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the {{ill|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|en|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|WD=Q859815|lt=Ishiyama Hongan-ji War}}. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the {{ill|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|en|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|WD=Q780023|lt=Ejima-Ikushima affair}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor {{ill|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|en|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|WD=Q5986166|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)}} gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “{{ill|Kanjinchō|en|Kanjinchō|WD=Q3179266|lt=Kanjin-chō}}.”
== Births == * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō}} 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|WD=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Mototada}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367}}). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Bizan Kawakami|en|Bizan Kawakami|WD=Q529950|lt=Kawakami Bēzan}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908}}).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1085|en|1085|WD=Q19459|lt=1085}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1}}) – {{ill|Thần Tông|en|Thần Tông|WD=Q21406278|lt=Emperor Shenzong (Song)}}, the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1048|en|1048|WD=Q19359|lt=1048}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|WD=Q2500|lt=April 14}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|en|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|WD=Q317736|lt=Utagawa Kuniyoshi}}, a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|4|3|6|2|5|4|3|0305|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

as a result, {{ill|Kōsa|ja|高佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} withdrew from Ishiyama, effectively ending the {{ill|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|en|Ishiyama_Hongan-ji_War|WD=Q859815|lt=Ishiyama Hongan-ji War|1=Ishiyama Hongan-ji War}}. * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18|1=April 18}}) – The senior retainer of Ōoku, {{ill|Eshima|ja|絵島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshima|1=Ejima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8013856}}, was exiled to Takato in Shinshū following punishment in the {{ill|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|en|Ejima-Ikushima_affair|WD=Q780023|lt=Ejima-Ikushima affair|1=Ejima-Ikushima affair}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – The 7th-generation kabuki actor {{ill|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|en|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|WD=Q5986166|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō (7th)|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VII}} gave the first performance of one of kabuki’s 18 repertoire pieces, “{{ill|Kanjinchō|en|Kanjinchō|WD=Q3179266|lt=Kanjin-chō|1=Kanjinchō}}.”
== Births == * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō|1=Ryakuō}} 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340|1=1340}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|WD=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Mototada|1=Ashikaga Motouji}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367|1=1367}}). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu|1=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550|1=1550}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – {{ill|Bizan Kawakami|en|Bizan Kawakami|WD=Q529950|lt=Kawakami Bēzan|1=Bizan Kawakami}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}}).
== Deaths == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1085|en|1085|WD=Q19459|lt=1085|1=1085}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}}) – {{ill|Thần Tông|en|Thần Tông|WD=Q21406278|lt=Emperor Shenzong (Song)|1=Thần Tông}}, the 6th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1048|en|1048|WD=Q19359|lt=1048|1=1048}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|WD=Q2500|lt=April 14|1=April 14}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|en|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|WD=Q317736|lt=Utagawa Kuniyoshi|1=Utagawa Kuniyoshi}}, a renowned ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797|1=1797}}).
